# Handcrafted

**Path:** `local_descriptor/handcrafted`

Local descriptors defined by deterministic geometric or signal-processing rules without learned parameters.

## Scope

**Include:** LRF-based descriptors; histogram or signature local features

**Exclude:** features learned from labelled or self-supervised data

## Papers (1)

### 2023
